channel.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - update
channel.description: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

item.title: Project Update: AnalysisToolbox
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Recent activity in AnalysisToolbox:

Recent Commits

  • 9aa7c7c feat: rename to GitAtbx — flatten to gitatbx/ root layout, symlink modules, add
  • 0ecdd64 Updated
  • 8eed337 chore: untrack build artifacts, add cli/.gitignore
  • b6675e3 feat: restructure repo to bin/modules/cli layout, add atbx v0.2.0 CLI, add PyPI
  • 7b70b5f feat: Add tree processing module for hierarchical data structure

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

View on GitHub → | See all projects →

item.title: Website Update
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
This website has been updated with the following changes:

Recent Changes

  • dd818b5 feat: add German versions of GitRef and GitAtbx tool pages
  • e7cd85c feat: rebrand analysis-toolbox page to GitAtbx
  • bf4587c fix: remove standalone binary references from GitRef pages
  • 446e37c feat: rename AnalysisToolbox -> GitAtbx, add GitRef project page
  • b05efda feat: add GitRef tool page and nav dropdown entry

The site continues to sync automatically with GitHub (projects) and ORCID (publications).

View source on GitHub →
